risks.description: GHG emissions from Vestas’ operations and value chain pose negative climate impacts, while low-emission materials offer financial opportunities.
mitigation: Offering low-emission materials improves value proposition

risks.description: Increased carbon taxes and tariffs raise costs for GHG-intensive materials like steel, impacting wind turbine production.
Fossil energy use in manufacturing and service of turbines negatively impacts climate, though scored as immaterial for financial materiality.
